subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Pen proclaimeth: Thy turning unto the Kaaba of divine purpose hath found acceptance, and the reward of attainment unto His presence hath been inscribed in thy missive [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی میفرماید توجهت بکعبه مقصود مقبول افتاد و اجر لقا در نامه ات ثبت شد
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
